'''vosaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocative|vocative]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocative|vocative]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vosaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosarithi|vosarithi]] || [[word:vosariji|vosariji]] || [[word:vosarishi|vosarishi]] || [[word:vosariki|vosariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosaruthuthu|vosaruthuthu]] || [[word:vosarujuju|vosarujuju]] || [[word:vosarushushu|vosarushushu]] || [[word:vosarukuku|vosarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosaruthu|vosaruthu]] || [[word:vosaruju|vosaruju]] || [[word:vosarushu|vosarushu]] || [[word:vosaruku|vosaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosarufthuf|vosarufthuf]] || [[word:vosarufjuf|vosarufjuf]] || [[word:vosarufshuf|vosarufshuf]] || [[word:vosarufkuf|vosarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosarethe|vosarethe]] || [[word:vosareje|vosareje]] || [[word:vosareshe|vosareshe]] || [[word:vosareke|vosareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosarothotho|vosarothotho]] || [[word:vosarojojo|vosarojojo]] || [[word:vosaroshosho|vosaroshosho]] || [[word:vosarokoko|vosarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosarotho|vosarotho]] || [[word:vosarojo|vosarojo]] || [[word:vosarosho|vosarosho]] || [[word:vosaroko|vosaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosarofthof|vosarofthof]] || [[word:vosarofjof|vosarofjof]] || [[word:vosarofshof|vosarofshof]] || [[word:vosarofkof|vosarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfthÃŸf|vosarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfjÃŸf|vosarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfshÃŸf|vosarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfkÃŸf|vosarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vosarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vosarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vosarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vosarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfthÃŸf|vosarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfjÃŸf|vosarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfshÃŸf|vosarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfkÃŸf|vosarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfthÃŸf|vosarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfjÃŸf|vosarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfshÃŸf|vosarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosarÃŸfkÃŸf|vosarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosarÃḊthÃḊ|vosarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vosarÃḊjÃḊ|vosarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vosarÃḊshÃḊ|vosarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vosarÃḊkÃḊ|vosarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosarathatha|vosarathatha]] || [[word:vosarajaja|vosarajaja]] || [[word:vosarashasha|vosarashasha]] || [[word:vosarakaka|vosarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosaratha|vosaratha]] || [[word:vosaraja|vosaraja]] || [[word:vosarasha|vosarasha]] || [[word:vosaraka|vosaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosarafthaf|vosarafthaf]] || [[word:vosarafjaf|vosarafjaf]] || [[word:vosarafshaf|vosarafshaf]] || [[word:vosarafkaf|vosarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vosarasha|vosarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosarshÃḋsha|vosarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosarosha|vosarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosarmusha|vosarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosaryasha|vosaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosarnkshÃḋsha|govosarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosarnkrosha|govosarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosarnkmusha|govosarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosarnkyasha|govosarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vosasarasha|vosasarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosasarshÃḋsha|vosasarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosasarosha|vosasarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosasarmusha|vosasarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosasaryasha|vosasaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosasarnkshÃḋsha|govosasarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosasarnkrosha|govosasarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosasarnkmusha|govosasarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosasarnkyasha|govosasarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vesÃḊrasha|vesÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vesÃḊrshÃḋsha|vesÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vesÃḊrosha|vesÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vesÃḊrmusha|vesÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vesÃḊryasha|vesÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govesÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|govesÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govesÃḊrnkrosha|govesÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govesÃḊrnkmusha|govesÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govesÃḊrnkyasha|govesÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vosfarasha|vosfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosfarshÃḋsha|vosfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosfarosha|vosfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosfarmusha|vosfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosfaryasha|vosfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosfarnkshÃḋsha|govosfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosfarnkrosha|govosfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosfarnkmusha|govosfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosfarnkyasha|govosfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
